title: 目標達成の後に・儚くも強く輝く夢！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day near the end of Bamboo Memory's junior
year...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: How was that, Trainer? Was I awesome?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! Thank you! I had a feeling I was getting
better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell how much Bamboo Memory has
improved this past year, and I'm so glad to know
she can feel that change too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And as her skills have improved, we've gotten a
better idea of what kind of races she's best suited
for.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking back at the data and her results up until
now, I'm quite sure those are the races where
Bamboo Memory can shine the brightest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But as her trainer, I have to keep an open mind. I
can't go closing any doors on her. I have to let her
explore as many routes as possible.
choice_data_list: Ready to discuss our plans for your classic year?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
For sure! Great timing too, since junior year's just
about over.
choice_data_list:
We should keep up your training arc through
spring of next year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we wait till just before the start of the classic
G1s, that will give me as much time as possible to
ascertain her skills!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Got it! It's just like a race—you've got to save up
your energy until just the right moment, then...
boom!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That way, when I come face-to-face with my
fearsome rivals, I'll be ready for our passionate
race of red-hot destiny!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yahoo! I'm so ready to go, I could burst! Let's
pick up the tempo, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to extend Bamboo Memory's
training arc into next year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, while Bamboo Memory is practicing
by herself...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Phew! That's the final set!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(My nails feel kinda weird... I should take a look
at them...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Hm. They don't look broken, but they do look
kind of... wonky.)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Looks like my nail care routine hasn't been
cutting it with how much work Trainer has been
heaping on...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I should probably tell Trainer about this later. For
now, I need to call it a day and take care of my
nails.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ardan? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Mejiro Ardan might have a weak constitution,
but she doesn't let that stop her! She's a racer
from the Mejiro family who works just as hard as
anyone else!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(She might have entered the academy before us,
but she'll be running the same races as Yaeno,
Chiyono O, and me!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's nice to see you, Bamboo... Are you feeling
unwell?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, I just came here to deal with my nails.
They're kinda brittle, so I have to take care of
them every once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I see. Taking good care of your body is very
important. Your diligence in that regard is very
admirable.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Aw, no! It's not that big a deal! My trainer's the
one who told me I have to take care of them, so I
can't take any credit!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Anyway, what about you? Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
When I was training earlier, I began to feel
somewhat ill. I'm just here to rest a while.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My heart rate and breathing have returned to
normal, so I'll be heading out again soon.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? I don't think you should push
yourself if you're not feeling great.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I appreciate your concern, but you don't
have to worry.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I know my body better than anyone else. I
certainly won't force myself past my limits.
Besides...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I can't afford to squander even a single second.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My body is so frail, I never know when it might
give up on me. And there is a limit to how much I
can train.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That's why I must take full advantage of these precious times when I can train. It is only by seizing every moment that I can grant my heart's dearest wish.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Her every word feels so... heavy. Maybe I'm
finally seeing just how determined she is.)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Not to be nosy, but can I ask what it is you're
working so hard toward?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Of course.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My older sister, Mejiro Ramonu, is the crown
jewel of the Mejiro family. She is also the first to
ever hold the Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Due to the sheer magnitude of her accolades, my
identity has been characterized only by my
relationship to her—casting my very name into
the shadows.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: But I wish to escape into the light.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Through my races, I will burn my name into the
hearts of the people and leave behind undeniable
proof that I, too, existed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I want to leave my mark on the world as myself,
Mejiro Ardan, and not merely as Mejiro Ramonu's
little sister.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That is what I strive toward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That is my dream.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I can feel it...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Your dream, your determination to make it come
true... I can feel the inferno that is your passion!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Bamboo...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Your older sister is both the obstacle you want to
overcome and also your rival, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...You're correct. One day, I will have to face her.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's incredible! I think that's a super admirable
dream!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I wanna be just like you and give it my all to every
second of every single day!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Thank you for telling me about your dream!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, it's nothing... I'm the one who should be
thanking you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The way you apply yourself and work as hard as
you can every single day... It gives me courage as
well.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Really?! I-I had no idea I had that kind of impact
on you! I'm always so focused on myself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... That's what makes you, you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...As we continue down our respective paths, let
us take extra caution to never neglect our health.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sounds like a plan!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh man, the sun's starting to set.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But I've gotta keep at it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Through my races, I will burn my name into the
hearts of the people and leave behind undeniable
proof that I, too, existed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I want to leave my mark on the world as myself,
Mejiro Ardan, and not merely as Mejiro Ramonu's
little sister.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That is what I strive toward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That is my dream.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to catch up to her one day... and race
against her!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That's my dream!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Only by honing both my mind and body through
fighting such formidable foes will I be able to
repay the kindness my grandparents showed me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That is what awaits me at the end of my battles.
Or, to borrow your own words...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That is my dream.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has such powerful dreams! And they're
pouring their blood, sweat, and tears into
fulfilling them!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta light my soul on fire until I blaze just as
brightly as they do! Only then can I stand
alongside as them as their rival!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: BURN BRIGHT, BAMBOO MEMORYYY!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No slacking off for me! I'm gonna keep this
training arc going into my classic year and give it
110 percent!
